subjectTemplate: Your IFPA Active Player status is about to expire
bodyTemplate:
Hello,

Your Active Player status expires on {displayDate}. Active Player status grants Tier 1 benefits (including inclusion on the Official IFPA Roster) to Tier 0 Registered Members. Your membership tier itself is for life and does not expire.

You can regain or extend Active Player status by any of the following:
  - Attending a qualifying IFPA-sanctioned event.
  - Being vouched for by a Tier 2 IFPA Organizer Member or Tier 3 Director.
  - Joining your first club, if you have not previously used this one-time grant.

--
International Footbag Players Association
